description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a long, flat seating platform and a single, gently sloped backrest at one end. The main structure appears to be constructed from a smooth, light-colored material, possibly painted wood or composite, with a contrasting section of darker, wood-textured material forming the inclined backrest and steps. The chaise is set on a broad, rectangular base, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The backrest is angled and extends partially along the length of the seat, offering ergonomic support for reclining. There is a distinct, dark rectangular area adjacent to the backrest, possibly serving as a footrest or accent. The overall aesthetic is clean and geometric, suitable for contemporary urban parks or public spaces.
description: A modern chaise with a flat, light-colored seat, an angled wood-textured backrest, and a broad rectangular base. The design is minimalist and geometric, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: From this side view, the chaise's sloped backrest and the flat, expansive seat are clearly visible, along with the contrasting dark accent area.
description_view_1: This end-on view highlights the chaise's width and the curved profile of the backrest, with the dark accent area appearing as a solid block.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the full length of the wood-textured backrest and the steps, emphasizing the chaise's layered construction.
description_view_3: From the rear, the stepped structure and the segmented wood-textured backrest are most prominent, showing the depth and support features.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, angled slab with a wood-textured finish, extending partially along one side of the chaise. It is moderately high, straight-edged, and lacks decorative elements or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise does not have distinct legs; instead, it rests on a broad, continuous rectangular base that provides stability and a grounded appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surfaces are solid and smooth, with a matte finish and no discernible pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No separate cushions are visible; the seating and backrest surfaces are integrated into the main structure, providing a streamlined, minimalist look.
